text: Trump to Axios: Lebanon can make a comeback.
text_zh: 特朗普对Axios表示：黎巴嫩可以东山再起。

text: Trump has spoken to Netanyahu “every day this week.” Source: Axios
text_zh: 特朗普本周“每天”都与内塔尼亚胡通话。来源：Axios

text: Trump said he told Netanyahu to limit military action in Lebanon to “surgical” strikes and avoid a broader war: He has got to do it more surgically. Not knock down buildings… it is too terrible and makes Israel look bad. Source: Axios
text_zh: 特朗普称他告诉内塔尼亚胡，在黎巴嫩的军事行动应限制在“外科手术式”打击，并避免引发更广泛的战争：他必须做得更具外科手术式。不要摧毁建筑物……这太可怕了，而且让以色列看起来很糟糕。来源：Axios

text: Trump to Axios: Iran ruined Lebanon. Their proxy [Hezbollah] ruined Lebanon. When Iran gets taken out, Hezbollah automatically gets taken out.
text_zh: 特朗普对Axios表示：伊朗毁了黎巴嫩。他们的代理人[真主党]毁了黎巴嫩。当伊朗被清除时，真主党自然也就被清除了。

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : ‼️ ‼️ ‼️ North Korea’s nuclear arsenal is approaching a critical turning point: it is becoming so large that it could potentially overwhelm the ground-based missile defense systems the United States has spent billions developing over the past 30 years. According to Bloomberg, North Korea’s nuclear capabilities may be outpacing U.S. defense systems. 💬 “South Korean President Lee Jae-myung stated in late January that Pyongyang is now capable of producing enough weapons-grade material for up to 20 nuclear weapons per year. This places it on a trajectory to rival France’s stockpile within the next decade—if not in technological sophistication, then at least in sheer volume. The construction or expansion of fissile material production facilities could further accelerate this growth, even as the country continues developing new delivery methods,” the article states. Video is made Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner转发 @StatWatch25 ：‼️ ‼️ ‼️ 朝鲜的核武库正接近一个关键转折点：其规模之大，可能足以压倒美国过去30年耗资数十亿美元开发的陆基导弹防御系统。据彭博社报道，朝鲜的核能力可能正在超越美国的防御系统。💬 “韩国总统李在明在1月底表示，平壤目前每年有能力生产足够的武器级材料，用于制造多达20枚核武器。如果这一趋势持续，未来十年内其核储备将足以与法国抗衡——即使在技术复杂性上无法相比，至少在数量上也是如此。文章指出，核裂变材料生产设施的建设或扩建可能会进一步加速这一增长，同时该国还在继续开发新的运载工具。” 视频由Grok AI制作 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @BrettErickson28 : @Felix_Nuno YUP! tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix转发 @BrettErickson28 ：@Felix_Nuno 是的！推文

text: OSINTdefender The Israeli Navy has reportedly intercepted the Global Freedom Flotilla that was headed to Gaza Strip. More to come, once a statement is made by the Israel Defense Force. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049603651388215370/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据报道，以色列海军拦截了前往加沙地带的“全球自由船队”。一旦以色列国防军发表声明，将会有更多消息。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049603651388215370/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump told Netanyahu that Israeli military should only take 'surgical' action in Lebanon, according to Axios report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据Axios报道，特朗普告诉内塔尼亚胡，以色列军队在黎巴嫩应仅采取“外科手术式”行动。推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: "Today, U.S. forces achieved a significant milestone after successfully redirecting the 42nd commercial vessel attempting to violate the blockade. This is a reflection of the outstanding work America's sons and daughters in uniform are doing to prevent maritime commerce from entering or exiting Iranian ports. Right now there are 41 tankers with 69 million barrels of oil that the Iranian regime can't sell. That's an estimated $6 billion-plus from which Iran’s leadership cannot financially benefit. The blockade is highly effective and U.S. forces remain fully committed to total enforcement." Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM Commander 42nd ship tied to Iran was turned around by the US Navy today. That’s going to start hurting very soon. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部：“今天，美国军队在成功拦截第42艘试图违反封锁的商船后，取得了一个重要的里程碑。这反映了美国身着制服的儿女们为阻止海上贸易进出伊朗港口所做的出色工作。目前有41艘油轮载有6900万桶石油，伊朗政权无法出售。据估计，伊朗领导层因此无法获得超过60亿美元的经济利益。封锁非常有效，美军仍完全致力于全面执行。” 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将。今天，第42艘与伊朗有关的船只被美国海军拦截并调头。这种情况很快就会开始造成痛苦。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTdefender Early reports indicate that air defenses near the U.S. Embassy in the Green Zone in Baghdad, Iraq are working to intercept a number of drones flying over the area. More to come. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 早期报告显示，伊拉克巴格达绿区美国大使馆附近的防空系统正在拦截飞越该地区的多架无人机。更多消息即将发布。推文

text: The Spectator Index Brent crude, now trading at over $120, is at the highest price since mid-2022. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 布伦特原油价格现已超过120美元，为2022年中期以来的最高价。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "Today's 6-3 Supreme Court decision in the Callais case is a BIG WIN for Equal Protection under the Law, as it returns the Voting Rights Act to its Original Intent, which was to protect against intentional Racial Discrimination. Thank you to brilliant Justice Samuel Alito for authoring this important and appropriate Opinion. Congratulations! President DONALD J. TRUMP" tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“今天最高法院在Callais案中做出的6-3裁决是法律面前平等保护的一大胜利，因为它使《投票权法案》回归其初衷，即防止蓄意的种族歧视。感谢才华横溢的塞缪尔·阿利托大法官撰写了这份重要且恰当的意见书。祝贺！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Gaza flotilla organizers release audio of an Israeli Navy officer warning them to turn back: "If you wish to deliver humanitarian aid to Gaza, you may do so through established and recognized channels. Please change course and return to the port of origin. If you are carrying humanitarian aid, you are invited to proceed to the port of Ashdod." Separately, Israel's Foreign Ministry says condoms and drugs were found on one of the intercepted ships, publishing video of the items. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 加沙船队组织者发布了一段以色列海军军官警告他们掉头的音频：“如果您希望向加沙运送人道主义援助物资，可以通过既定和认可的渠道进行。请改变航向并返回出发港。如果您携带人道主义援助物资，欢迎前往阿什杜德港。” 另外，以色列外交部表示，在其中一艘被拦截的船只上发现了避孕套和毒品，并发布了这些物品的视频。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @annmarie : Axios: U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has prepared a plan for a "short and powerful" wave of strikes on Iran in hopes of breaking the negotiating deadlock, three sources with knowledge said. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix转发 @annmarie ：Axios：据三位知情人士透露，美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）已制定了一项针对伊朗的“短促而有力”的打击计划，以期打破谈判僵局。推文

text: Open Source Intel 42nd ship tied to Iran was turned around by the US Navy today. That’s going to start hurting very soon. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 今天，第42艘与伊朗有关的船只被美国海军拦截并调头。这种情况很快就会开始造成痛苦。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) He is legally cooked Passenger Opens Emergency Exit Door On Delayed Delta Flight In Atlanta Amid Severe Thunderstorm Disruptions A chaotic scene unfolded aboard a Delta Air Lines flight at Atlanta after severe thunderstorms caused major delays for a trip bound for Chicago. Video shared online showed an enraged passenger shouting at crew members about the extended delay before grabbing and opening an emergency exit door while the plane was still on the ground. The aircraft, carrying 168 passengers, was eventually returned to the gate at Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport, where the man was removed by security. The flight had been held due to a ground stop at Chicago’s O’Hare International Airport and later departed hours behind schedule, finally reaching Chicago early the next morning. 🎥 : @KimKatieUSA - Breaking911 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 他在法律上完了。亚特兰大达美航空航班因严重雷暴延误，乘客强行打开紧急出口。亚特兰大达美航空一架飞往芝加哥的航班在严重雷暴导致重大延误后，机舱内发生了混乱。网上分享的视频显示，一名愤怒的乘客在飞机仍停在地面时，因长时间延误而对机组人员大喊大叫，随后抓住并打开了紧急出口门。这架载有168名乘客的飞机最终被送回哈茨菲尔德-杰克逊亚特兰大国际机场的登机口，该男子被安保人员带走。该航班此前因芝加哥奥黑尔国际机场的地面停飞而受阻，最终比原定时间晚了数小时起飞，并于次日清晨抵达芝加哥。 🎥 : @KimKatieUSA - Breaking911 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Ghalibaf: 3 days in, no well exploded. We could extend to 30 and livestream the well here. That was the kind of junk advice the US admin gets from people like Bessent who also push the blockade theory and cranked oil up to $120+. Next stop: 140. The issue isn't the theory, it's the mindset. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗的加利巴夫：三天过去了，没有油井爆炸。我们可以延长到30天，并在这里直播油井。这就是美国政府从贝森特（Bessent）这类人那里得到的垃圾建议，他们还推行封锁理论，并将油价推高至120美元以上。下一站：140美元。问题不在于理论，而在于心态。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @RepJoeWilson : As co-chair of the House Republican Israel Caucus, I am grateful to bring attention to war criminal Putin’s support for the Iranian regime’s Death to America, Death to Israel agenda. Blood-soaked grain, stolen from temporarily occupied areas of Ukraine, must be rejected. https://twitter.com/RepJoeWilson/status/2049592466500718813/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix转发 @RepJoeWilson ：作为众议院共和党以色列核心小组的联合主席，我很感激能让大家关注战犯普京对伊朗政权“打倒美国，打倒以色列”议程的支持。必须拒绝从乌克兰临时占领区窃取的血腥谷物。https://twitter.com/RepJoeWilson/status/2049592466500718813/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇨 🇨🇴 Ecuador’s President Daniel Noboa said Colombian guerrillas carried out a cross-border incursion into northern Ecuador, blaming Colombia’s government and vowing to protect the country’s borders and population. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇨 🇨🇴 厄瓜多尔总统丹尼尔·诺博亚表示，哥伦比亚游击队对厄瓜多尔北部进行了跨境入侵，他指责哥伦比亚政府，并誓言保护该国边境和人民。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Хроника специальной военной операции 📝 за 29 апреля 2026 года 🧨 Российские войска нанесли удары дронами по объектам энергетики в Черниговской и Николаевской областях , а также продолжают вторую неделю подряд атаковать портовую инфраструктуру Одесской области , повреждено очередное судно. Украинские формирования осуществили массированный налет на Крым, Орск и Пермь , повреждения получили промышленные предприятия и гражданская инфраструктура. Один из украинских дронов упал на территории Казахстана . В Туапсе продолжается ликвидация последствий на территории НПЗ . ➡️ На Слобожанском направлении на северном фланге штурмовые подразделения ГВ «Север» завершили освобождение Новодмитровки , расположенной в нескольких километрах к востоку от Краснополья . ➡️ На Константиновском направлении штурмовики заканчивают зачистку Ильиновки, ведут бои в центре Константиновки . Восточнее ВСУ все еще удерживают позиции на окраине Часова Яра , поступают сообщения об освобождении Новодмитровки . 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Обстановка в зоне специальной военной операции ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Слобожанское направление ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Констатниновское направление ( ru ; en ) 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #карта #Краснодар #Крым #Одесса #Оренбург #Пермь #Россия #Украина ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 2026年4月29日特别军事行动纪事 📝 🧨 俄罗斯军队对切尔尼戈夫州和尼古拉耶夫州的能源设施进行了无人机打击，并连续第二周继续攻击敖德萨州的港口基础设施，又有一艘船只受损。乌克兰武装部队对克里米亚、奥尔斯克和彼尔姆进行了大规模袭击，工业企业和民用基础设施受损。一架乌克兰无人机坠落在哈萨克斯坦境内。图阿普谢炼油厂区域的后续清理工作仍在继续。 ➡️ 在斯洛博然斯克方向，北侧的“北方”部队突击分队完成了对新德米特罗夫卡的解放，该地位于克拉斯诺波利以东几公里处。 ➡️ 在康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向，突击队员正在完成对伊利诺夫卡的清理，并在康斯坦丁诺夫卡市中心进行战斗。在东部，乌军仍占据着恰索夫亚尔郊区的阵地，有消息称新德米特罗夫卡已被解放。 📎 高分辨率地图： 🔸 特别军事行动区局势 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 斯洛博然斯克方向 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向 ( ru ; en ) 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #地图 #克拉斯诺达尔 #克里米亚 #敖德萨 #奥伦堡 #彼尔姆 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇪UAE Energy Minister Al Mazroui reassured that the UAE will not shock the oil market by drastically increasing production. "And one of the questions that I did put to the minister here is once things normalize on the Straits, can we expect a huge uptick…" ⚡️ 🇦🇪 Reuters: OPEC+ is expected to agree a small oil output quota hike of around 188,000 barrels per day on Sunday, despite the loss of a significant portion of its exports due to the US-Israeli war with Iran and the exit of the United Arab Emirates from the group. The decision would indicate that OPEC+ is adopting a business as usual approach. The group's exports have been severely impacted by the war, which began on February 28, and the resulting closure of the Hormuz Strait. Crude oil output from all OPEC+ members averaged 35.06 million bpd in March, down 7.70 million bpd from February. @wfwitness ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Reuters: OPEC+ is expected to agree a small oil output quota hike on Sunday, despite the loss of a significant portion of its exports due to the US-Israeli war with Iran and the exit of the United Arab Emirates from the group. The increase is likely to be around 188,000 barrels per day in oil output targets. The decision would indicate that OPEC+ is adopting a business as usual approach, according to one of the sources. The group's exports have been severely impacted by the war, which began on February 28, and the resulting closure of the Hormuz Strait. Crude oil output from all OPEC+ members averaged 35.06 million bpd in March, down 7.70 million bpd from February. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇪阿联酋能源部长马兹鲁伊重申，阿联酋不会通过大幅增加产量来冲击石油市场。“我向部长提出的问题之一是，一旦海峡局势正常化，我们是否可以期待产量大幅回升……” ⚡️ 🇦🇪 路透社：尽管由于美以与伊朗的战争导致其大部分出口损失，且阿联酋退出了该组织，但欧佩克+（OPEC+）预计仍将在周日同意将石油日产量配额小幅提高约18.8万桶。这一决定表明欧佩克+正在采取一切照旧的方针。该组织的出口受到自2月28日开始的战争以及随之而来的霍尔木兹海峡关闭的严重影响。3月份所有欧佩克+成员国的原油日产量平均为3506万桶，比2月份减少了770万桶。@wfwitness ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 路透社：尽管由于美以与伊朗的战争导致其大部分出口损失，且阿联酋退出了该组织，但欧佩克+预计仍将在周日同意将石油日产量配额小幅提高。据消息人士称，石油日产量目标可能会增加约18.8万桶。这一决定表明欧佩克+正在采取一切照旧的方针。该组织的出口受到自2月28日开始的战争以及随之而来的霍尔木兹海峡关闭的严重影响。3月份所有欧佩克+成员国的原油日产量平均为3506万桶，比2月份减少了770万桶。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Fars News Agency: A source in Iran’s oil ministry has confirmed that oil revenues are now flowing in dollars, not yuan as previously reported. The source said crude is being sold at more than double the price of the same period in Bahman (January‑February), and the return of oil currency to the central bank is taking place without problems. According to tanker tracking data, Iran’s oil exports have increased from 1.5 million barrels per day before the war to 1.8 million bpd, despite the U.S. naval blockade. During the blockade itself, 15 million barrels have been exported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 法尔斯通讯社：伊朗石油部的一位消息人士证实，石油收入目前以美元结算，而非此前报道的人民币。该消息人士称，原油售价是巴赫曼月（1月至2月）同期的两倍多，石油货币回流中央银行的过程没有出现问题。根据油轮跟踪数据，尽管面临美国的海上封锁，伊朗的石油出口量已从战前的每日150万桶增加到每日180万桶。在封锁期间，已出口了1500万桶石油。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 Two minors found dead inside Syrian Transitional Government prisons. More than a month after their disappearance near the town of Bakka in the Swaida countryside, they were arrested on the administrative border between Daraa and Swaida. Pro-Syrian networks announced at the time that Karam and Muhannad had been arrested. Days passed without any reliable information about their fate, except for sporadic and unconfirmed reports, until the last two days when contact was received from intermediaries in the city of Jaramana stating that they had died and that their bodies were in a hospital in Daraa, to be transferred to Swaida in the coming days. There are still no confirmations or clear details about the circumstances of their deaths, as their families await the arrival of their bodies in Swaida for forensic examination. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 两名未成年人在叙利亚过渡政府监狱内被发现死亡。在他们于苏韦达省巴卡镇附近失踪一个多月后，他们在德拉和苏韦达的行政边界被捕。亲叙利亚网络当时宣布卡拉姆（Karam）和穆罕纳德（Muhannad）已被捕。几天过去了，除了零星且未经证实的报道外，没有任何关于他们命运的可靠消息，直到过去两天，从贾拉马纳市的中间人那里收到消息称他们已经死亡，尸体在德拉的一家医院，将在未来几天转移到苏韦达。目前仍没有关于他们死亡情况的确认或明确细节，他们的家人正在等待尸体运抵苏韦达进行法医检查。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Air defences, likely a U.S. C-Ram system, shot down a drone inside Baghdad’s heavily fortified Green Zone. Unconfirmed reports also indicate the explosions were heard close to the U.S. embassy in the capital. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 防空系统（可能是美国的C-Ram系统）在巴格达戒备森严的“绿区”内击落了一架无人机。未经证实的报道还指出，在首都美国大使馆附近听到了爆炸声。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇷🇺 💥 🇺🇦 More from Odessa 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics 🇷🇺 💥 🇺🇦 更多来自敖德萨的消息 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸Al-Jazeera: The majority of the seized Global Summud vessels will be brought to the port of Ashdod. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Al-Jazeera: The IDF is now imposing a maritime blockade on Gaza after being ordered by political leadership. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸半岛电视台：大部分被扣押的“全球坚韧”（Global Summud）号船只将被带往阿什杜德港。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 半岛电视台：在政治领导层的命令下，以色列国防军目前正在对加沙实施海上封锁。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Additional footage of the Israeli Navy ordering the flotilla to withdraw. “This is the Israeli Navy. Attempts to break the lawful maritime blockade on the Gaza Strip constitutes a violation of international law.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Al-Jazeera: The majority of the seized Global Summud vessels will be brought to the port of Ashdod. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 以色列海军命令船队撤离的更多画面。“这里是以色列海军。试图打破对加沙地带合法海上封锁的行为构成了对国际法的违反。”@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 半岛电视台：大部分被扣押的“全球坚韧”号船只将被带往阿什杜德港。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇮🇷 The Islamic Rightists Movement (Harakat Ashab al‑Yamin al‑Islamia, HAYI) has claimed responsibility for today’s stabbing attack in Golders Green, London, which left two Jewish men seriously injured. HAYI, an Iran‑linked group, has previously claimed…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇸🇴 The MET reports that the perpetrator of the Golders Green terrorist attack is a British National born in Somalia. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇮🇷 伊斯兰右翼运动（Harakat Ashab al‑Yamin al‑Islamia, HAYI）已宣布对今天发生在伦敦戈尔德斯格林（Golders Green）的持刀袭击事件负责，该事件导致两名犹太男子受重伤。与伊朗有关联的组织 HAYI 此前曾声称……” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇸🇴 伦敦警察厅报告称，戈尔德斯格林恐怖袭击的肇事者是一名出生于索马里的英国公民。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 A member of the Global Sumud Flotilla says that 11 of their boats have lost communication with the rest of the Flotilla. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Additional footage of the Israeli Navy ordering the flotilla to withdraw. “This is the Israeli Navy. Attempts to break the lawful maritime blockade on the Gaza Strip constitutes a violation of international law.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 全球坚韧船队（Global Sumud Flotilla）的一名成员表示，他们有 11 艘船只与船队其余部分失去了联系。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列海军命令船队撤离的更多画面。“这里是以色列海军。试图打破对加沙地带合法海上封锁的行为构成了对国际法的违反。” @wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index US military says the blockade means there are now '41 tankers with 69 million barrels of oil that the Iranian regime can't sell', with a value of over $6 billion. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国军方表示，封锁意味着现在有“41 艘油轮载有 6900 万桶伊朗政权无法出售的石油”，价值超过 60 亿美元。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @RepDonBacon : The Pentagon says it has now released the $400M for Ukraine funding. A few Republicans, including @RepDonBacon, questioned the Ukraine funding delay at Pete Hegseth’s HASC hearing today. Likely fodder at tomorrow’s SASC appearance. - Joe Gould tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @RepDonBacon：五角大楼表示，现已发放 4 亿美元的乌克兰援助资金。包括 @RepDonBacon 在内的几位共和党人今天在皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）主持的众议院军事委员会（HASC）听证会上质疑了乌克兰资金的延迟问题。这很可能成为明天参议院军事委员会（SASC）会议上的谈资。- Joe Gould 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Statement from Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander on the success of the U.S. blockade against Iran: https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2049594027582832881/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Adm. Brad Cooper）海军上将关于美国对伊朗封锁取得成功的声明：https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2049594027582832881/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Advisor to Khamenei Jr: "US military officials are warning that if Washington continues the war, there is a real possibility its warships could be sunk and its troops killed." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049593735516692948/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈梅内伊之子的顾问：“美国军方官员警告称，如果华盛顿继续战争，其军舰被击沉、士兵被杀的可能性是真实存在的。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049593735516692948/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Advisor to Khamenei Jr: "We will not tolerate a naval blockade. If the blockade continues, Iran will respond." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049593422642602258/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈梅内伊之子的顾问：“我们不会容忍海上封锁。如果封锁继续，伊朗将做出回应。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049593422642602258/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @i24NEWS_EN : BREAKING: Israeli security source confirms Israeli Navy started interception of Gaza Global Sumud Flotilla as it’s currently located near the Greek Island of Crete 🔴 Global Sumud Gaza flotilla claims they were approached by Israeli military speedboats with assault weapons. Earlier Israeli Foreign ministry said: “The driving force behind the flotilla provocation is Hamas - joining hands with professional provocateurs - with the aim of sabotaging President Trump’s peace plan transition to its second phase” - i24NEWS English tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @i24NEWS_EN：突发：以色列安全消息人士证实，以色列海军已开始拦截加沙“全球坚韧船队”，该船队目前位于希腊克里特岛附近 🔴 加沙全球坚韧船队声称，他们遭到了携带突击武器的以色列军用快艇的接近。此前以色列外交部表示：“船队挑衅背后的驱动力是哈马斯——他们与专业挑衅者联手——旨在破坏特朗普总统和平计划向第二阶段的过渡” - i24NEWS English 推文

text: Open Source Intel US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Close to half a billion in Iran-related crypto seized. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049592293514948921/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国财政部长贝森特（Bessent）：已查获近 5 亿美元与伊朗相关的加密货币。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049592293514948921/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel's Navy is intercepting ships from the "Global Sumud Flotilla" that departed Italy. 7 of 58 vessels seized so far. Operations are taking place well before the flotilla reached Israeli waters. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列海军正在拦截从意大利出发的“全球坚韧船队”的船只。目前已扣押 58 艘船只中的 7 艘。行动在船队到达以色列领海前很久就已经开始。推文

text: The Spectator Index Price of Brent crude oil Ten days ago: $94 Now: $120 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 布伦特原油价格 十天前：94 美元 现在：120 美元 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Navy Chief: Soon, we’ll reveal a weapon they deeply fear, right on their doorstep. Hope it doesn’t give them a heart attack! tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗海军司令：很快，我们将揭示一种他们深感恐惧的武器，就在他们的家门口。希望这不会让他们心脏病发作！推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @business : Pentagon officials confirmed the release of $400 million in funds for Ukraine that already had been authorized by Congress, after the top Senate Republican overseeing defense spending criticized Pentagon leaders for withholding the money. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-29/pentagon-released-400-million-ukraine-funding-hegseth-says?taid=69f263dc9e11680001e66a6e&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @business：五角大楼官员证实，在负责国防开支的参议院共和党高层批评五角大楼领导人扣留资金后，五角大楼已发放了国会此前批准的 4 亿美元乌克兰援助资金。https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-29/pentagon-released-400-million-ukraine-funding-hegseth-says?taid=69f263dc9e11680001e66a6e&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Israeli Navy has begun intercepting the 58-vessel activist flotilla near the Greek island of Crete, hundreds of nautical miles from Gaza. Past interceptions took place much closer to shore. The flotilla organizers say military speedboats "pointed lasers and semi-automatic assault weapons" and ordered participants "to get on their hands and knees." JUST IN 🔴 It’s about to go down. Gaza flotilla organizers say several fast military boats identifying themselves as Israel approached the vessels, aimed lasers and weapons, ordered passengers to move forward and raise their hands. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列海军已开始在距离加沙数百海里的希腊克里特岛附近拦截由 58 艘船只组成的活动人士船队。过去的拦截行动发生在离岸更近的地方。船队组织者称，军用快艇“用激光和半自动突击武器瞄准”，并命令参与者“跪下”。突发 🔴 情况即将升级。加沙船队组织者称，几艘自称是以色列的快速军用船只接近了这些船只，用激光和武器瞄准，并命令乘客向前移动并举起双手。- Open Source Intel 推文

text: The Spectator Index TODAY US crude oil: +8% Brent crude oil: +8% European natural gas: +9% Heating oil: +5.7% Gasoline: +5.3% tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 今日 美国原油：+8% 布伦特原油：+8% 欧洲天然气：+9% 取暖油：+5.7% 汽油：+5.3% 推文

text: Open Source Intel Treasury Secretary Bessent: "We're willing to do secondary sanctions on Iran oil buyers." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 财政部长贝森特：“我们愿意对伊朗石油买家实施二级制裁。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) A close-up photo of the burning fuel tank on the territory of the "Perm" line production and dispatch station. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049589949628825675/photo/1 After Tuapse, the time came for Perm. On Wednesday, Ukrainian drone strikes hit the linear production and dispatch station located near the Russian city of Perm, over 1,500km from the border with Ukraine. As result of the attack, a major fire broke out on the territory of the facility, with the amount of smoke causing the sky over the Perm city to turn black. The "Perm" linear production and dispatch station (ЛПДС «Пермь») is a important node of the Perm-Almetyevsk oil pipeline, owned by JSC Transneft-Prikamye. The object is responsible for pumping, saving and distributing oil through main pipelines of the the Transneft system. - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) “彼尔姆”（Perm）线路生产和调度站区域内燃烧的燃料罐特写照片。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049589949628825675/photo/1 继图阿普谢（Tuapse）之后，轮到了彼尔姆。周三，乌克兰无人机袭击了位于俄罗斯彼尔姆市附近、距离乌克兰边境 1500 多公里的线路生产和调度站。袭击导致该设施发生大火，产生的烟雾使彼尔姆市上空变黑。“彼尔姆”线路生产和调度站（ЛПДС «Пермь»）是彼尔姆-阿尔梅季耶夫斯克（Perm-Almetyevsk）输油管道的重要节点，由 Transneft-Prikamye 公司拥有。该设施负责通过 Transneft 系统的主要管道进行石油的泵送、储存和分配。- Status-6 (War & Military News) 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Speaker of the Iranian Parliament Ghalibaf mocked U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent’s statement that Iran’s oil wells or infrastructure would quickly fail under pressure have so far not materialised three days into the campaign. He also accused Bessent of promoting blockade strategies that helped drive oil prices toward $120 per barrel, with warnings they could rise further. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）嘲讽了美国财政部长贝森特的声明，称伊朗石油井或基础设施在压力下会迅速崩溃的说法在行动开始三天后并未实现。他还指责贝森特推行的封锁策略导致油价推高至每桶 120 美元，并警告称油价可能进一步上涨。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command commander Adm. Brad Cooper announced that U.S. forces have redirected the 42nd commercial vessel attempting to violate the blockade on Iranian ports. “Right now there are 41 tankers with 69 million barrels of oil that the Iranian regime can’t sell. That’s an estimated $6 billion‑plus from which Iran’s leadership cannot financially benefit,” he said. “The blockade is highly effective and US forces remain fully committed to total enforcement.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将宣布，美军已拦截了第 42 艘试图违反伊朗港口封锁的商船。“目前有 41 艘油轮载有 6900 万桶伊朗政权无法出售的石油。据估计，伊朗领导层无法从中获得超过 60 亿美元的经济利益，”他说。“封锁非常有效，美军仍完全致力于全面执行。” @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: 3 days in, no well exploded. We could extend to 30 and livestream the well here. That was the kind of junk advice the US admin gets from people like Bessent who also push the blockade theory and cranked oil up to $120+. Next stop: 140. The issue isn't the theory, it's the mindset.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：三天过去了，没有一口油井爆炸。我们可以延长到30天，并在这里直播油井情况。这就是美国政府从贝森特（Bessent）这类人那里得到的垃圾建议，他们还推行封锁理论，并将油价推高至120美元以上。下一站：140美元。问题不在于理论，而在于心态。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸The Israeli Foreign Ministry has released footage of what appears to be condoms and alleged cocaine bags seized during the interception of Global Summud vessels. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 A member of the Global Sumud Flotilla says that 11 of their boats have lost communication with the rest of the Flotilla. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸以色列外交部发布了在拦截‘全球坚韧’号（Global Summud）船只期间缴获的疑似避孕套和可卡因袋的视频。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 ‘全球坚韧’船队的一名成员表示，他们有11艘船只与船队其余部分失去了联系。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸Additional footage of an Israeli frigate approaching Global Summud vessels off the coast of Cyprus. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The Israeli Foreign Ministry has released footage of what appears to be condoms and alleged cocaine bags seized during the interception of Global Summud vessels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸以色列护卫舰在塞浦路斯海岸附近接近‘全球坚韧’号船只的额外视频。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列外交部发布了在拦截‘全球坚韧’号船只期间缴获的疑似避孕套和可卡因袋的视频。@wfwitness
